name: The Big Dipper
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Can Hormel Chili No Beans
10 oz Can Ro-Tel Tomatoes & Green Chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned tomatoes and green chiles, reserving about 1 tablespoon of juice for garnish.
2. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except the pasteurized processed cheese.
3. Heat just until the cheese melts, stirring frequently.
4. Serve warm with assorted raw vegetable dippers and toasted French bread slices.
5. Makes 4 cups (62 minutes left), (H)elp, More?
